title: Merge two WooCommerce customer accounts
summary: Consolidate a duplicate customer into a master account: reassign orders and subscriptions, transfer course/LMS access, then remove the empty duplicate.

requires.notes: Steps 1-5 and 8 use core WC/WP REST. Step 6 (LMS) varies by plugin and may need a gap-filler primitive or the LMS's own REST namespace — resolve from the site manifest.

steps.action: Transfer course / LMS access (GAP — varies by LMS)
steps.method: LMS REST namespace from manifest, or lms_enrollment_transfer gap-filler

steps.action: Verify access and orders now resolve under master
steps.method: re-query orders, subscriptions, enrollments for master_id

rollback: No cross-call transaction. Checkpoint at step 3 records original order/subscription/enrollment ownership. On failure, STOP and report; re-run is safe because each set-customer_id step is idempotent. Operator may restore from backup if needed.
